   290тЖТ| **1-3 Months** | Weekly bars | Resource conflicts | Task redistribution |
   291тЖТ| **2-4 Weeks** | Simplified Gantt | Track occupancy, bottlenecks | Block movement |
   292тЖТ| **1 Week** | Detailed Gantt | Status per train, mileage | Fine scheduling |
   293тЖТ| **1-3 Days** | Capsules with details | Fitness, remaining km | Specific route assignment |
   294тЖТ
   295тЖТ---
   296тЖТ
   297тЖТ## Wireframes (ASCII)
   298тЖТ
   299тЖТ### Application Shell (Three-Layer Sandwich)
   300тЖТ
   301тЖТ```
   302тЖТLAYER 1: BACKGROUND (Workers)
   303тЖТ  - Constraint processing, availability calculations
   304тЖТ
   305тЖТLAYER 2: CANVAS (WebGL/R3F)
   306тЖТ  - Task bars, dependency lines, heatmaps
   307тЖТ  - LOD rendering (Macro/Meso/Micro)
   308тЖТ
   309тЖТLAYER 3: HUD OVERLAY (HTML/React)
   310тЖТ  - pointer-events: none (except buttons)
   311тЖТ  - Time axis header
   312тЖТ  - Train list sidebar
   313тЖТ  - Tooltips and context menus
   314тЖТ  - Scenario sidebar
   315тЖТ```
   316тЖТ
   317тЖТ### Train Capsule Component
   318тЖТ
   319тЖТ```
   320тЖТ+-----------------------------------+
   321тЖТ| [train] KS-042  |  B-Check  | 3d  |
   322тЖТ| Kinki Sharyo    [======--]        |
   323тЖТ+-----------------------------------+
   324тЖТ  ^        ^          ^        ^
   325тЖТ  |        |          |        +-- Duration
   326тЖТ  |        |          +----------- Maintenance type badge
   327тЖТ  |        +---------------------- Train ID (monospace)
   328тЖТ  +------------------------------- Fleet icon
   329тЖТ```
   330тЖТ
   331тЖТ### Financial Pulse HUD
   332тЖТ
   333тЖТ```
   334тЖТ+----------------------------+
   335тЖТ| $ Schedule Cost Impact     |
   336тЖТ|                            |
   337тЖТ| Baseline: AED 12.4M        |
   338тЖТ| Current:  AED 12.7M (+2.4%)|
   339тЖТ|                            |
   340тЖТ| [============--] 89% Budget|
   341тЖТ+----------------------------+
   342тЖТ```
   343тЖТPosition: Top-right corner, always visible
   344тЖТ
   345тЖТ### Zoom Level Indicator
   346тЖТ
   347тЖТ```
   348тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
   349тЖТ| Zoom: [======*============] 1-3 Months (Tactical)                   |
   350тЖТ|                                                                     |
   351тЖТ| View: [Workload Equalizer v] [Gantt] [Calendar] [Matrix]           |
   352тЖТ|       ------------------                                            |
   353тЖТ|            (default)                                                |
   354тЖТ|                                                                     |
   355тЖТ| Mode: [* Baseline] [o Scenario: "Strike Impact"]                   |
   356тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
   357тЖТ```
   358тЖТ
   359тЖТ### Scenario Panel
   360тЖТ
   361тЖТ```
   362тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------------------+
   363тЖТ|                                                               |
   364тЖТ|  [PRODUCTION *]    [SCENARIO o]                              |
   365тЖТ|                                                               |
   366тЖТ|  +-----------------------------------------------------------+
   367тЖТ|  | Scenarios:                                                 |
   368тЖТ|  |  * "Baseline 2025" (current)                              |
   369тЖТ|  |  * "August Strike Impact" <- ACTIVE                       |
   370тЖТ|  |  * "Fleet Expansion +20 trains"                           |
   371тЖТ|  |  [+ New Scenario]                                         |
   372тЖТ|  +-----------------------------------------------------------+
   373тЖТ|                                                               |
   374тЖТ|  Delta from Baseline:                                         |
   375тЖТ|   * OPEX 2026: +$2.3M (+4.2%)                                |
   376тЖТ|   * Overruns: 12 trains at risk                              |
   377тЖТ|   * Man-hours Q3: -2,400 (strike)                            |
   378тЖТ|                                                               |
   379тЖТ|  [Discard] [Compare with...] [Apply to Production]            |
   380тЖТ|                                                               |
   381тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------------------+
   382тЖТ```
   383тЖТ
   384тЖТ### Minimap
   385тЖТ
   386тЖТ```
   387тЖТ+----------------------------------+
   388тЖТ|  [Heatmap Grid 40x10]            |
   389тЖТ|  +----+                          |
   390тЖТ|  |    | <- Viewport indicator    |
   391тЖТ|  +----+                          |
   392тЖТ+----------------------------------+
   393тЖТ```
   394тЖТPosition: Bottom-right, always visible
   395тЖТDimensions: 200px x 80px
   396тЖТ
   397тЖТ### LOD Transition Zones
   398тЖТ
   399тЖТ```
   400тЖТZoom:  0.05  0.35  0.50         2.00  2.15  5.0
   401тЖТ        |     |     |             |     |    |
   402тЖТMACRO   [=====|-----|             |     |    ]  100% -> fade out
   403тЖТMESO          [-----|=============|-----|    ]  fade in -> 100% -> fade out
   404тЖТMICRO               |             [-----|====]  fade in -> 100%
   405тЖТ        |     |     |             |     |    |
   406тЖТ        |     +-----+             +-----+    |
   407тЖТ        |   crossfade            crossfade   |
   408тЖТ        |     zone                 zone      |
   409тЖТ```
   410тЖТ
   411тЖТ### Component Directory Structure
   412тЖТ
   413тЖТ```
   414тЖТsrc/components/
   415тЖТ+-- layout/           # AppHeader, Sidebar, TimeScrubber
   416тЖТ+-- controls/         # ZoomLevelIndicator, ViewSelector, ModeToggle
   417тЖТ+-- common/           # MetricBadge, TaskTooltip, ConflictAlert
   418тЖТ+-- gantt/            # TaskBlock, GanttRow, TimelineHeader
   419тЖТ+-- heatmap/          # HeatmapCell, HeatmapGrid, DNAStrip
   420тЖТ+-- canvas/           # R3F wrapper components
   421тЖТ    +-- HeatmapCanvas.tsx
   422тЖТ    +-- GanttCanvas.tsx
   423тЖТ    +-- DNAStripCanvas.tsx
   424тЖТ
   425тЖТsrc/render/           # R3F/Three.js rendering
   426тЖТ+-- layers/
   427тЖТ    +-- MacroLayer.ts
   428тЖТ    +-- MesoLayer.ts
   429тЖТ    +-- MicroLayer.ts
   430тЖТ+-- FractalRenderer.ts
   431тЖТ```
   432тЖТ
   433тЖТ### Fractal Propagation (Bidirectional Changes)
   434тЖТ
   435тЖТ```
   436тЖТOPERATIONAL CHANGE (Day level):
   437тЖТ  +-- Change train 104 route: Long -> Short
   438тЖТ       +-- Daily mileage changes: -450km
   439тЖТ            +-- Next PM prediction: +3 days
   440тЖТ                 +-- March workload changes
   441тЖТ                      +-- Q1/2026 workload changes
   442тЖТ                           +-- 2026 annual cost changes
   443тЖТ                                +-- 12-year projection changes
   444тЖТ
   445тЖТSTRATEGIC CHANGE (12-year level):
   446тЖТ  +-- Move Alstom fleet overhaul: 2027 -> 2028
   447тЖТ       +-- Budget 2027 decreases, Budget 2028 increases
   448тЖТ            +-- Monthly workload redistributes
   449тЖТ                 +-- Weekly track availability changes
   450тЖТ                      +-- Daily scheduling needs recalculation
   451тЖТ                           +-- Individual train routes may conflict
   452тЖТ```
   453тЖТ
   454тЖТ---
   455тЖТ
   456тЖТ## CSS Custom Properties Template
   457тЖТ
   458тЖТ```css
   459тЖТ:root {
   460тЖТ  /* Dark Theme (default) */
   461тЖТ  --mms-bg-app: #1a1a2e;
   462тЖТ  --mms-bg-card: #16213e;
   463тЖТ  --mms-bg-surface: #1f2937;
   464тЖТ  --mms-bg-hover: #374151;
   465тЖТ  --mms-bg-selected: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2);
   466тЖТ
   467тЖТ  --mms-text-primary: #f9fafb;
   468тЖТ  --mms-text-secondary: #d1d5db;
   469тЖТ  --mms-text-muted: #9ca3af;
   470тЖТ  --mms-text-disabled: #6b7280;
   471тЖТ
   472тЖТ  --mms-border-default: #374151;
   473тЖТ  --mms-border-light: #4b5563;
   474тЖТ  --mms-border-focus: #3b82f6;
   475тЖТ
   476тЖТ  --mms-primary: #2563eb;
   477тЖТ  --mms-primary-hover: #1d4ed8;
   478тЖТ
   479тЖТ  /* Maintenance Types */
   480тЖТ  --mms-maint-pm1: #22c55e;
   481тЖТ  --mms-maint-pm2: #3b82f6;
   482тЖТ  --mms-maint-hm: #f59e0b;
   483тЖТ  --mms-maint-ovh: #ef4444;
   484тЖТ
   485тЖТ  /* Status */
   486тЖТ  --mms-status-available: #22c55e;
   487тЖТ  --mms-status-in-service: #3b82f6;
   488тЖТ  --mms-status-maintenance: #ef4444;
   489тЖТ
   490тЖТ  /* Variance */
   491тЖТ  --mms-variance-green: #22c55e;
   492тЖТ  --mms-variance-yellow: #f59e0b;
   493тЖТ  --mms-variance-red: #ef4444;
   494тЖТ
   495тЖТ  /* Typography */
   496тЖТ  --mms-font-primary: 'Inter', sans-serif;
   497тЖТ  --mms-font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
   498тЖТ  --mms-text-xs: 10px;
   499тЖТ  --mms-text-sm: 12px;
   500тЖТ  --mms-text-base: 14px;
   501тЖТ  --mms-text-lg: 16px;
   502тЖТ  --mms-text-xl: 18px;
   503тЖТ  --mms-text-4xl: 36px;
   504тЖТ  --mms-font-medium: 500;
   505тЖТ  --mms-font-semibold: 600;
   506тЖТ
   507тЖТ  /* Spacing */
   508тЖТ  --mms-space-xs: 4px;
   509тЖТ  --mms-space-sm: 8px;
   510тЖТ  --mms-space-md: 16px;
   511тЖТ  --mms-space-lg: 24px;
   512тЖТ
   513тЖТ  /* Layout */
   514тЖТ  --mms-sidebar-width: 130px;
   515тЖТ  --mms-navbar-height: 44px;
   516тЖТ  --mms-px-per-train: 24px;
   517тЖТ  --mms-px-per-day: 10px;
   518тЖТ
   519тЖТ  /* Animation */
   520тЖТ  --mms-transition-default: 100ms;
   521тЖТ  --mms-transition-lod: 200ms;
   522тЖТ  --mms-transition-zoom: 250ms;
   523тЖТ  --mms-transition-nav: 300ms;
   524тЖТ
   525тЖТ  /* Border Radius */
   526тЖТ  --mms-radius-sm: 4px;
   527тЖТ  --mms-radius-md: 6px;
   528тЖТ  --mms-radius-lg: 8px;
   529тЖТ}
   530тЖТ
   531тЖТ/* Light theme override */
   532тЖТ[data-theme="light"] {
   533тЖТ  --mms-bg-app: #f8fafc;
   534тЖТ  --mms-bg-card: #ffffff;
   535тЖТ  --mms-bg-surface: #f5f8fa;
   536тЖТ  --mms-text-primary: #182026;
   537тЖТ  --mms-text-secondary: #5c7080;
   538тЖТ  --mms-text-muted: #8a9ba8;
   539тЖТ}
   540тЖТ```
   541тЖТ
   542тЖТ---
   543тЖТ
   544тЖТ## PatternFly 6 Integration Notes
   545тЖТ
   546тЖТ- Use PatternFly 6 tokens where available
   547тЖТ- Override with `--mms-*` tokens for custom values
   548тЖТ- Cards use `Elevation.TWO` shadow
   549тЖТ- Drawers position on right side for task details
   550тЖТ- Maintain dark theme as primary for canvas contrast
   551тЖТ
   552тЖТ---
   553тЖТ
   554тЖТ## Performance Considerations
   555тЖТ
   556тЖТ- Canvas background: Pure black (`#0A0A0A`) for OLED power savings
   557тЖТ- Minimize color variety in heatmaps to improve GPU batching
   558тЖТ- Use opacity transitions over color transitions for smoother LOD
   559тЖТ- Prefer `transform` and `opacity` for animations (GPU-accelerated)
   560тЖТ

# MMS Design System

> Metro Maintenance Scheduler - Visual Design Specifications
> Extracted from previous implementation attempts

---

## Color Palette

### Dark Theme (Primary)

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--mms-bg-app` | `#1a1a2e` | Main app background - deep navy |
| `--mms-bg-card` | `#16213e` | Card/panel background - dark blue |
| `--mms-bg-surface` | `#1f2937` | Elevated surfaces - slate |
| `--mms-bg-hover` | `#374151` | Hover state background |
| `--mms-bg-selected` | `rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2)` | Selected item - blue tint |
| `--mms-text-primary` | `#f9fafb` | Primary text - near white |
| `--mms-text-secondary` | `#d1d5db` | Secondary text - light gray |
| `--mms-text-muted` | `#9ca3af` | Muted text - medium gray |
| `--mms-text-disabled` | `#6b7280` | Disabled state text |
| `--mms-border-default` | `#374151` | Default borders - dark gray |
| `--mms-border-light` | `#4b5563` | Light borders |
| `--mms-border-focus` | `#3b82f6` | Focus ring - blue |
| `--bg-canvas` | `#0A0A0A` | Main canvas background |
| `--bg-panel` | `#141414` | Panel/sidebar background |
| `--text-primary` | `#FAFAFA` | Primary text (canvas) |
| `--text-secondary` | `#A1A1A1` | Secondary text (canvas) |

### Light Theme

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--mms-bg-app` | `#f8fafc` | Main app background |
| `--mms-bg-card` | `#ffffff` | Card/panel background |
| `--mms-bg-surface` | `#f5f8fa` | Elevated surfaces |

| `--mms-text-secondary` | `#5c7080` | Secondary text |
| `--mms-text-muted` | `#8a9ba8` | Muted text |
| `--row-even` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)` | Even row background |
| `--row-odd` | `rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.5)` | Odd row background (slate-50) |

### Brand Colors

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--mms-primary` | `#2563eb` | Brand/primary color |
| `--mms-primary-hover` | `#1d4ed8` | Primary hover state |
| `--focus-indicator` | `#8b5cf6` | Focus ring for keyboard navigation (violet-500) |
| `--selection-highlight` | `#06b6d4` | Selection highlight (cyan-500) |

### Maintenance Type Colors

| Token | Hex | Usage |

### Grid & Structural

---

## Typography

### Font Family

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--font-primary` | `Inter` | Primary font for all UI text |
| `--font-mono` | `JetBrains Mono` | Monospace for train IDs, timestamps |

### Font Sizes

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--mms-text-xs` | `10px` | Extra small - compact labels |
| `--mms-text-sm` | `12px` | Small text |
| `--mms-text-base` | `14px` | Base text size |
| `--mms-text-lg` | `16px` | Large text |
| `--mms-text-xl` | `18px` | Extra large text |
| `--mms-text-4xl` | `36px` | Large heading/KPI values |

### Font Weights

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--mms-font-medium` | `500` | Medium weight for emphasis |
| `--font-semibold` | `600` | Semibold for headings |

---

## Spacing

### Base Scale

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| Base unit | `4px` | Foundation of spacing system |
| `--mms-space-xs` | `4px` | Extra small spacing |
| `--mms-space-sm` | `8px` | Small spacing |
| `--mms-space-md` | `16px` | Medium spacing (default padding) |
| `--mms-space-lg` | `24px` | Large spacing |

### Layout Dimensions

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--sidebar-width` | `130px` | Fixed sidebar width for train list |
| `--navbar-height` | `44px` | Navigation bar height |
| `--px-per-train` | `24px` | Height per train row in canvas |
| `--px-per-day` | `10px` | Width per day on X axis |
| `--cell-width-macro` | `300px` | Heatmap cell width (30 days) |
| `--overscan` | `200px` | Viewport culling overscan |
| `--task-card-height` | `36px` | Task card height in micro view |
| `--task-row-height` | `20px` | Task row height in sidebar |

### Minimap

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--minimap-width` | `200px` | Minimap width |
| `--minimap-height` | `80px` | Minimap height |
| `--minimap-grid` | `40x10 cells` | Minimap heatmap grid |

---

## Components

### Border Radius

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | `4px` | Small radius |
| `--radius-md` | `6px` | Medium radius (task cards) |
| `--radius-lg` | `8px` | Large radius |

### Card/Panel

| Property | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Elevation | `Elevation.TWO` | Card shadow (PatternFly) |
| Padding | `12px` | Card padding for overlays |
| KPI border-left | `4px solid` | KPI card left indicator |

### Grid Lines

| Property | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Major line width | `1.5px` | Month boundaries |
| Minor line width | `1px` | Week boundaries |

### Task Card Gradients

| Type | Value |
|------|-------|
| Maintenance | `linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #1d4ed8)` |
| Overhaul | `linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #d97706)` |
| Inspection | `linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669)` |

### Effects

| Property | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Conflict glow | `0 0 8px rgba(239,68,68,0.4)` | Red glow for conflicts |
| Dependency offset | `8px` | Dependency line offset |

---

## Animation

### Durations

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--transition-all` | `100ms` | Default transition |
| `--lod-crossfade` | `200ms` | LOD layer transitions |
| `--animated-zoom` | `250ms` | Smooth zoom animation |
| `--navigation-smooth` | `300ms` | Navigation animations |

### Transforms

| Property | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Hover lift | `translateY(-2px)` | Task card hover effect |
| Hover brightness | `1.5x` | Task brightness increase |

### Easing

| Property | Value | Usage |
|----------|-------|-------|
| LOD easing | `easeOutExpo` | LOD transition easing |
| Crossfade | `Hermite smoothstep` | LOD layer crossfade |

---

## LOD (Level of Detail) System

### Zoom Thresholds

| Layer | Zoom Range | Display |
|-------|------------|---------|
| MACRO only | `< 0.35` | Heatmap (100% opacity) |
| MACRO тЖТ MESO | `0.35 - 0.50` | Crossfade zone |
| MESO only | `0.50 - 2.00` | DNA/bars (100% opacity) |
| MESO тЖТ MICRO | `2.00 - 2.15` | Crossfade zone |
| MICRO only | `> 2.15` | Detailed cards (100% opacity) |

### Configuration

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Min zoom | `0.05` |
| Max zoom | `5.0` |
| Initial zoom | `1.0` |
| Hysteresis | `15%` overlap zone |

### Timeline Granularity

| Zoom Range | Display |
|------------|---------|
| `< 0.5x` | Years |
| `0.5x - 1.5x` | Months |
| `1.5x - 3.0x` | Weeks |
| `> 3.0x` | Days |

---

## Semantic Zoom Levels (Business View)

| Scale | Visual | Analysis | Edit Actions |
|-------|--------|----------|--------------|
| **12 Years** | Heatmap by year/fleet | Total capacity, CAPEX/OPEX | Large overhaul blocks |
| **3-5 Years** | Heatmap + trends | Fleet lifecycle patterns | Fleet maintenance strategy |
| **1-2 Years** | Quarterly bars | Seasonality, forecasted peaks | Quarterly budget allocation |
| **Quarter** | Monthly bars | Workload vs capacity | Macro leveling |
| **1-3 Months** | Weekly bars | Resource conflicts | Task redistribution |
| **2-4 Weeks** | Simplified Gantt | Track occupancy, bottlenecks | Block movement |
| **1 Week** | Detailed Gantt | Status per train, mileage | Fine scheduling |
| **1-3 Days** | Capsules with details | Fitness, remaining km | Specific route assignment |

---

## Wireframes (ASCII)

### Application Shell (Three-Layer Sandwich)

```
LAYER 1: BACKGROUND (Workers)
  - Constraint processing, availability calculations

LAYER 2: CANVAS (WebGL/R3F)
  - Task bars, dependency lines, heatmaps
  - LOD rendering (Macro/Meso/Micro)

LAYER 3: HUD OVERLAY (HTML/React)
  - pointer-events: none (except buttons)
  - Time axis header
  - Train list sidebar
  - Tooltips and context menus
  - Scenario sidebar
```

### Train Capsule Component

```
+-----------------------------------+
| [train] KS-042  |  B-Check  | 3d  |
| Kinki Sharyo    [======--]        |
+-----------------------------------+
  ^        ^          ^        ^
  |        |          |        +-- Duration
  |        |          +----------- Maintenance type badge
  |        +---------------------- Train ID (monospace)
  +------------------------------- Fleet icon
```

### Financial Pulse HUD

```
+----------------------------+
| $ Schedule Cost Impact     |
|                            |
| Baseline: AED 12.4M        |
| Current:  AED 12.7M (+2.4%)|
|                            |
| [============--] 89% Budget|
+----------------------------+
```
Position: Top-right corner, always visible

### Zoom Level Indicator

```
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Zoom: [======*============] 1-3 Months (Tactical)                   |
|                                                                     |
| View: [Workload Equalizer v] [Gantt] [Calendar] [Matrix]           |
|       ------------------                                            |
|            (default)                                                |
|                                                                     |
| Mode: [* Baseline] [o Scenario: "Strike Impact"]                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Scenario Panel

```
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                               |
|  [PRODUCTION *]    [SCENARIO o]                              |
|                                                               |
|  +-----------------------------------------------------------+
|  | Scenarios:                                                 |
|  |  * "Baseline 2025" (current)                              |
|  |  * "August Strike Impact" <- ACTIVE                       |
|  |  * "Fleet Expansion +20 trains"                           |
|  |  [+ New Scenario]                                         |
|  +-----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                               |
|  Delta from Baseline:                                         |
|   * OPEX 2026: +$2.3M (+4.2%)                                |
|   * Overruns: 12 trains at risk                              |
|   * Man-hours Q3: -2,400 (strike)                            |
|                                                               |
|  [Discard] [Compare with...] [Apply to Production]            |
|                                                               |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Minimap

```
+----------------------------------+
|  [Heatmap Grid 40x10]            |
|  +----+                          |
|  |    | <- Viewport indicator    |
|  +----+                          |
+----------------------------------+
```
Position: Bottom-right, always visible
Dimensions: 200px x 80px

### LOD Transition Zones

```
Zoom:  0.05  0.35  0.50         2.00  2.15  5.0
        |     |     |             |     |    |
MACRO   [=====|-----|             |     |    ]  100% -> fade out
MESO          [-----|=============|-----|    ]  fade in -> 100% -> fade out
MICRO               |             [-----|====]  fade in -> 100%
        |     |     |             |     |    |
        |     +-----+             +-----+    |
        |   crossfade            crossfade   |
        |     zone                 zone      |
```

### Component Directory Structure

```
src/components/
+-- layout/           # AppHeader, Sidebar, TimeScrubber
+-- controls/         # ZoomLevelIndicator, ViewSelector, ModeToggle
+-- common/           # MetricBadge, TaskTooltip, ConflictAlert
+-- gantt/            # TaskBlock, GanttRow, TimelineHeader
+-- heatmap/          # HeatmapCell, HeatmapGrid, DNAStrip
+-- canvas/           # R3F wrapper components
    +-- HeatmapCanvas.tsx
    +-- GanttCanvas.tsx
    +-- DNAStripCanvas.tsx

src/render/           # R3F/Three.js rendering
+-- layers/
    +-- MacroLayer.ts
    +-- MesoLayer.ts
    +-- MicroLayer.ts
+-- FractalRenderer.ts
```

### Fractal Propagation (Bidirectional Changes)

```
OPERATIONAL CHANGE (Day level):
  +-- Change train 104 route: Long -> Short
       +-- Daily mileage changes: -450km
            +-- Next PM prediction: +3 days
                 +-- March workload changes
                      +-- Q1/2026 workload changes
                           +-- 2026 annual cost changes
                                +-- 12-year projection changes

STRATEGIC CHANGE (12-year level):
  +-- Move Alstom fleet overhaul: 2027 -> 2028
       +-- Budget 2027 decreases, Budget 2028 increases
            +-- Monthly workload redistributes
                 +-- Weekly track availability changes
                      +-- Daily scheduling needs recalculation
                           +-- Individual train routes may conflict
```

---

## CSS Custom Properties Template

```css
:root {
  /* Dark Theme (default) */
  --mms-bg-app: #1a1a2e;
  --mms-bg-card: #16213e;
  --mms-bg-surface: #1f2937;
  --mms-bg-hover: #374151;
  --mms-bg-selected: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2);

  --mms-text-primary: #f9fafb;
  --mms-text-secondary: #d1d5db;
  --mms-text-muted: #9ca3af;
  --mms-text-disabled: #6b7280;

  --mms-border-default: #374151;
  --mms-border-light: #4b5563;
  --mms-border-focus: #3b82f6;

  --mms-primary: #2563eb;
  --mms-primary-hover: #1d4ed8;

  /* Maintenance Types */
  --mms-maint-pm1: #22c55e;
  --mms-maint-pm2: #3b82f6;
  --mms-maint-hm: #f59e0b;
  --mms-maint-ovh: #ef4444;

  /* Status */
  --mms-status-available: #22c55e;
  --mms-status-in-service: #3b82f6;
  --mms-status-maintenance: #ef4444;

  /* Variance */
  --mms-variance-green: #22c55e;
  --mms-variance-yellow: #f59e0b;
  --mms-variance-red: #ef4444;

  /* Typography */
  --mms-font-primary: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  --mms-font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  --mms-text-xs: 10px;
  --mms-text-sm: 12px;
  --mms-text-base: 14px;
  --mms-text-lg: 16px;
  --mms-text-xl: 18px;
  --mms-text-4xl: 36px;
  --mms-font-medium: 500;
  --mms-font-semibold: 600;

  /* Spacing */
  --mms-space-xs: 4px;
  --mms-space-sm: 8px;
  --mms-space-md: 16px;
  --mms-space-lg: 24px;

  /* Layout */
  --mms-sidebar-width: 130px;
  --mms-navbar-height: 44px;
  --mms-px-per-train: 24px;
  --mms-px-per-day: 10px;

  /* Animation */
  --mms-transition-default: 100ms;
  --mms-transition-lod: 200ms;
  --mms-transition-zoom: 250ms;
  --mms-transition-nav: 300ms;

  /* Border Radius */
  --mms-radius-sm: 4px;
  --mms-radius-md: 6px;
  --mms-radius-lg: 8px;
}

/* Light theme override */
[data-theme="light"] {
  --mms-bg-app: #f8fafc;
  --mms-bg-card: #ffffff;
  --mms-bg-surface: #f5f8fa;
  --mms-text-primary: #182026;
  --mms-text-secondary: #5c7080;
  --mms-text-muted: #8a9ba8;
}
```

---

## PatternFly 6 Integration Notes

- Use PatternFly 6 tokens where available
- Override with `--mms-*` tokens for custom values
- Cards use `Elevation.TWO` shadow
- Drawers position on right side for task details
- Maintain dark theme as primary for canvas contrast

---

## Performance Considerations

- Canvas background: Pure black (`#0A0A0A`) for OLED power savings
- Minimize color variety in heatmaps to improve GPU batching
- Use opacity transitions over color transitions for smoother LOD
- Prefer `transform` and `opacity` for animations (GPU-accelerated)

1тЖТ# MMS (Metro Maintenance Scheduler) - UX Specification
     2тЖТ
     3тЖТ> **Version:** 1.0.0
     4тЖТ> **Last Updated:** 2026-01-07
     5тЖТ> **Status:** SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for implementation
     6тЖТ> **Target:** Dubai Metro - 128 trains x 12 years x ~60k tasks @ 60fps
     7тЖТ
     8тЖТ---
     9тЖТ
    10тЖТ## Table of Contents
    11тЖТ
    12тЖТ1. [Application Shell Layout](#1-application-shell-layout)
    13тЖТ2. [Component Specifications](#2-component-specifications)
    14тЖТ3. [Interaction States](#3-interaction-states)
    15тЖТ4. [Color Palette](#4-color-palette)
    16тЖТ5. [Typography](#5-typography)
    17тЖТ6. [Responsive Behavior](#6-responsive-behavior)
    18тЖТ7. [Appendix: ASCII Wireframes](#appendix-ascii-wireframes)
    19тЖТ
    20тЖТ---
    21тЖТ
    22тЖТ## 1. Application Shell Layout
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТ### 1.1 Overall Architecture
    25тЖТ
    26тЖТThe application uses a **Three-Layer Sandwich** architecture:
    27тЖТ
    28тЖТ```
    29тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
    30тЖТ|                        LAYER 3: HUD OVERLAY                            |
    31тЖТ|   HTML/React - pointer-events: none (except interactive elements)      |
    32тЖТ|   - Navbar, Sidebar, Timeline Header, Minimap, Tooltips, Panels        |
    33тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
    34тЖТ|                        LAYER 2: CANVAS (WebGL)                         |
    35тЖТ|   PixiJS/R3F - Main rendering surface                                  |
    36тЖТ|   - Task bars, dependency lines, heatmaps, LOD layers                  |
    37тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
    38тЖТ|                        LAYER 1: ENGINE                                 |
    39тЖТ|   Background workers - constraint processing, data calculations        |
    40тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
    41тЖТ```
    42тЖТ
    43тЖТ### 1.2 Viewport Dimensions
    44тЖТ
    45тЖТ| Breakpoint | Width | Layout |
    46тЖТ|------------|-------|--------|
    47тЖТ| Desktop XL | >= 1920px | Full layout, expanded sidebar |
    48тЖТ| Desktop | >= 1280px | Full layout, collapsed sidebar by default |
    49тЖТ| Tablet | 768px - 1279px | Collapsed sidebar, smaller minimap |
    50тЖТ| Mobile | < 768px | Full-screen canvas, bottom sheet panels |
    51тЖТ
    52тЖТ### 1.3 Region Dimensions (Desktop >= 1280px)
    53тЖТ
    54тЖТ```
    55тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    56тЖТ|                                NAVBAR (56px height)                                |
    57тЖТ+-------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
    58тЖТ|             |                   TIMELINE HEADER (32px height)                      |
    59тЖТ|   SIDEBAR   +---------------------------------------------------------------------+
    60тЖТ|  (130px     |                                                                     |
    61тЖТ|  collapsed) |                                                                     |
    62тЖТ|             |                      MAIN CANVAS                                    |
    63тЖТ|  (280px     |                  (flex: fills remaining space)                      |
    64тЖТ|  expanded)  |                                                                     |
    65тЖТ|             |                                                     +---------------+
    66тЖТ|             |                                                     |   MINIMAP     |
    67тЖТ|             |                                                     |  (180x120px)  |
    68тЖТ+-------------+-----------------------------------------------------+---------------+
    69тЖТ```
    70тЖТ
    71тЖТ### 1.4 Z-Index Layering
    72тЖТ
    73тЖТ| Layer | Z-Index | Contents |
    74тЖТ|-------|---------|----------|
    75тЖТ| Modals/Dialogs | 1000 | Confirmation dialogs, alerts |
    76тЖТ| Dropdowns | 900 | Navbar dropdowns, context menus |
    77тЖТ| Tooltips | 800 | Task tooltips, info hovers |
    78тЖТ| Detail Panel | 700 | Right drawer (400px) |
    79тЖТ| Minimap | 600 | Bottom-right navigation |
    80тЖТ| Navbar | 500 | Top navigation bar |
    81тЖТ| Sidebar | 400 | Left train list |
    82тЖТ| Timeline Header | 300 | Top timeline ruler |
    83тЖТ| Canvas | 0 | Main WebGL surface |
    84тЖТ
    85тЖТ### 1.5 Dark Theme Colors (Application Shell)
    86тЖТ
    87тЖТ| Region | Token | Value (Dark) | Usage |
    88тЖТ|--------|-------|--------------|-------|
    89тЖТ| App Background | `--pf-t--global--background--color--primary--default` | `#151515` | Main app background |
    90тЖТ| Canvas Background | `--mms-bg-canvas` | `#0A0A0A` | WebGL canvas |
    91тЖТ| Panel Background | `--mms-bg-panel` | `#1F1F1F` | Sidebar, navbar |
    92тЖТ| Surface Background | `--mms-bg-surface` | `#292929` | Cards, elevated elements |
    93тЖТ| Border Default | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` | `#3D3D3D` | Dividers |
    94тЖТ
    95тЖТ---
    96тЖТ
    97тЖТ## 2. Component Specifications
    98тЖТ
    99тЖТ### 2.1 Navbar
   100тЖТ
   101тЖТ**Dimensions:** Full width x 56px height
   102тЖТ**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
   103тЖТ**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (bottom)
   104тЖТ
   105тЖТ```
   106тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
   107тЖТ| [Logo]  |  [<] [100%] [>] [Fit] |  [Baseline|Scenario] |  Tasks: 12.4k | [...]  |
   108тЖТ+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
   109тЖТ   ^              ^                         ^                   ^            ^
   110тЖТ   |              |                         |                   |            |
   111тЖТ 24x24px     Zoom Controls           Mode Toggle           KPI Badge    Settings
   112тЖТ```
   113тЖТ
   114тЖТ#### 2.1.1 Logo (Left Region)
   115тЖТ
   116тЖТ| Property | Value |
   117тЖТ|----------|-------|
   118тЖТ| Position | Left, 16px padding |
   119тЖТ| Size | 24px x 24px icon + text |
   120тЖТ| Font | RedHatDisplay, 16px, semibold (700) |
   121тЖТ| Color | `--pf-t--global--text--color--regular` |
   122тЖТ| Text | "MMS" or "Metro Scheduler" |
   123тЖТ
   124тЖТ#### 2.1.2 Zoom Controls (Center-Left Region)
   125тЖТ
   126тЖТ| Element | Specification |
   127тЖТ|---------|---------------|
   128тЖТ| Container | Horizontal flex, gap: 8px |
   129тЖТ| Zoom Out Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `minus`, border-radius: 4px |
   130тЖТ| Zoom Indicator | Min-width: 60px, text-align: center, format: "125%" |
   131тЖТ| Zoom In Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `plus`, border-radius: 4px |
   132тЖТ| Fit-to-View Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `expand`, tooltip: "Fit all tasks" |
   133тЖТ| Buttons Background | `--mms-bg-surface` hover: `--mms-bg-hover` |
   134тЖТ
   135тЖТ#### 2.1.3 Mode Toggle (Center Region)
   136тЖТ
   137тЖТ| State | Visual | Color |
   138тЖТ|-------|--------|-------|
   139тЖТ| Baseline (Active) | Solid button | `#0066CC` (PatternFly blue) |
   140тЖТ| Baseline (Inactive) | Outline button | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` |
   141тЖТ| Scenario (Active) | Solid button | `#6753AC` (PatternFly purple) |
   142тЖТ| Scenario (Inactive) | Outline button | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` |
   143тЖТ
   144тЖТ**Behavior:**
   145тЖТ- Toggle switches between Baseline (production data) and Scenario (sandbox)
   146тЖТ- Active mode shows solid background with icon
   147тЖТ- Scenario mode adds subtle purple tint to canvas border
   148тЖТ
   149тЖТ#### 2.1.4 KPI Indicators (Center-Right Region)
   150тЖТ
   151тЖТ```
   152тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------+
   153тЖТ| Tasks: 12,456 | Conflicts: 23 | Utilization: 87% |
   154тЖТ+---------------------------------------------------+
   155тЖТ```
   156тЖТ
   157тЖТ| KPI | Format | Color Logic |
   158тЖТ|-----|--------|-------------|
   159тЖТ| Total Tasks | Number with commas | Static white |
   160тЖТ| Conflicts | Number | Red if > 0, green if 0 |
   161тЖТ| Resource Utilization | Percentage | Green 80-100%, Yellow 60-79%, Red <60% |
   162тЖТ
   163тЖТ**Badge Styling:**
   164тЖТ- Background: `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)`
   165тЖТ- Border-radius: 16px (pill shape)
   166тЖТ- Padding: 4px 12px
   167тЖТ- Font: 12px, medium (500)
   168тЖТ
   169тЖТ#### 2.1.5 Settings Dropdown (Right Region)
   170тЖТ
   171тЖТ| Item | Icon | Action |
   172тЖТ|------|------|--------|
   173тЖТ| Theme | `moon`/`sun` | Toggle dark/light theme |
   174тЖТ| Export | `download` | Export schedule as CSV/PDF |
   175тЖТ| Settings | `cog` | Open settings modal |
   176тЖТ| Help | `question-circle` | Open help documentation |
   177тЖТ
   178тЖТ---
   179тЖТ
   180тЖТ### 2.2 Train Sidebar (Left Panel)
   181тЖТ
   182тЖТ**Dimensions:**
   183тЖТ- Collapsed: 130px width
   184тЖТ- Expanded: 280px width
   185тЖТ- Height: Full viewport minus navbar (calc(100vh - 56px))
   186тЖТ
   187тЖТ**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
   188тЖТ**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (right)
   189тЖТ
   190тЖТ#### 2.2.1 Collapsed State (130px)
   191тЖТ
   192тЖТ```
   193тЖТ+------------------+
   194тЖТ| [>] Trains (128) |
   195тЖТ+------------------+
   196тЖТ| [T] ALT-001      |
   197тЖТ| [T] ALT-002      |
   198тЖТ| [T] ALT-003      |
   199тЖТ| ...              |
   200тЖТ| [T] KNK-050      |
   201тЖТ+------------------+
   202тЖТ```
   203тЖТ
   204тЖТ| Element | Specification |
   205тЖТ|---------|---------------|
   206тЖТ| Header Height | 44px |
   207тЖТ| Expand Button | 24px x 24px, icon: `chevron-right` |
   208тЖТ| Header Text | "Trains (128)", 14px, semibold |
   209тЖТ| Row Height | Synced with canvas: `pxPerTrain * zoom` (default: 24px) |
   210тЖТ| Train Icon | 16px x 16px, color varies by asset type |
   211тЖТ| Train ID | 12px, monospace (RedHatMono) |
   212тЖТ| Hover State | Background: `--mms-bg-hover` |
   213тЖТ| Selected State | Background: `--mms-bg-selected`, left border: 3px `--pf-t--global--color--brand--default` |
   214тЖТ
   215тЖТ**Train Icon Colors:**
   216тЖТ- ALSTOM: `#3B82F6` (blue)
   217тЖТ- KINKI: `#F59E0B` (amber)
   218тЖТ
   219тЖТ#### 2.2.2 Expanded State (280px)
   220тЖТ
   221тЖТ```
   222тЖТ+--------------------------------+
   223тЖТ| [<] Trains (128)   [Search...] |
   224тЖТ+--------------------------------+
   225тЖТ| [T] ALT-001                    |
   226тЖТ|     Alstom Metropolis          |
   227тЖТ|     Status: In Service         |
   228тЖТ+--------------------------------+
   229тЖТ| [T] ALT-002                    |
   230тЖТ|     Alstom Metropolis          |
   231тЖТ|     Status: Maintenance        |
   232тЖТ+--------------------------------+
   233тЖТ```
   234тЖТ
   235тЖТ| Element | Specification |
   236тЖТ|---------|---------------|
   237тЖТ| Search Input | Full width minus padding, height: 32px |
   238тЖТ| Row Height | 72px (3 lines of info) |
   239тЖТ| Primary Text | Train ID, 14px, semibold |
   240тЖТ| Secondary Text | Fleet name, 12px, `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` |
   241тЖТ| Status Badge | 10px, pill shape, color by status |
   242тЖТ
   243тЖТ**Status Badge Colors:**
   244тЖТ- In Service: `#3E8635` (green)
   245тЖТ- Maintenance: `#F0AB00` (gold)
   246тЖТ- Out of Service: `#C9190B` (red)
   247тЖТ
   248тЖТ#### 2.2.3 Scroll Synchronization
   249тЖТ
   250тЖТThe sidebar scroll position MUST be synchronized with the canvas Y position:
   251тЖТ
   252тЖТ```typescript
   253тЖТ// Sidebar scroll offset calculation
   254тЖТconst sidebarScrollTop = camera.y * zoom;
   255тЖТ```
   256тЖТ
   257тЖТ---
   258тЖТ
   259тЖТ### 2.3 Timeline Header
   260тЖТ
   261тЖТ**Dimensions:** Full canvas width x 32px height
   262тЖТ**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
   263тЖТ**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (bottom)
   264тЖТ
   265тЖТ#### 2.3.1 Display by Zoom Level
   266тЖТ
   267тЖТ| Zoom Range | Primary Labels | Secondary Labels | Grid Lines |
   268тЖТ|------------|----------------|------------------|------------|
   269тЖТ| < 0.3x | Years (2024, 2025...) | None | Year boundaries |
   270тЖТ| 0.3x - 0.7x | Years | Quarters (Q1, Q2...) | Quarter boundaries |
   271тЖТ| 0.7x - 1.5x | Quarters | Months (Jan, Feb...) | Month boundaries |
   272тЖТ| 1.5x - 3.0x | Months | Weeks (W1, W2...) | Week boundaries |
   273тЖТ| > 3.0x | Weeks | Days (Mon, Tue...) | Day boundaries |
   274тЖТ
   275тЖТ#### 2.3.2 Label Styling
   276тЖТ
   277тЖТ| Label Type | Font | Color | Position |
   278тЖТ|------------|------|-------|----------|
   279тЖТ| Primary | 14px, semibold | `--pf-t--global--text--color--regular` | Baseline, left-aligned to boundary |
   280тЖТ| Secondary | 11px, regular | `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` | Below primary, center-aligned |
   281тЖТ| Today Marker | 11px, bold | `#0066CC` | Vertical line + "Today" label |
   282тЖТ
   283тЖТ#### 2.3.3 Today Indicator
   284тЖТ
   285тЖТ```
   286тЖТ                    |
   287тЖТ                 [Today]
   288тЖТ                    |
   289тЖТ                    v
   290тЖТ```
   291тЖТ
   292тЖТ- Vertical line: 2px width, `#0066CC`
   293тЖТ- Label: "Today" in blue pill badge
   294тЖТ- Extends full canvas height as dotted line
   295тЖТ
   296тЖТ---
   297тЖТ
   298тЖТ### 2.4 Semantic Zoom Canvas (Main Area)
   299тЖТ
   300тЖТ**Position:** Fills remaining space after navbar, sidebar, and timeline header
   301тЖТ**Background:** `--mms-bg-canvas` (#0A0A0A)
   302тЖТ
   303тЖТ#### 2.4.1 LOD (Level of Detail) System
   304тЖТ
   305тЖТ```

   579тЖТ## 3. Interaction States
   580тЖТ
   581тЖТ### 3.1 Task States
   582тЖТ
   583тЖТ#### 3.1.1 Visual State Matrix
   584тЖТ
   585тЖТ| State | Background | Border | Effects | Cursor |
   586тЖТ|-------|------------|--------|---------|--------|
   587тЖТ| Default | Task type color | None | None | default |
   588тЖТ| Hover | +20% brightness | None | Slight scale (1.02) | pointer |
   589тЖТ| Selected | Task type color | 2px cyan `#06B6D4` | Elevation shadow | pointer |
   590тЖТ| Dragging | 50% opacity | 2px dashed | Drop shadow | grabbing |
   591тЖТ| Conflict | Task type color | None | Red glow (pulsing) | pointer |
   592тЖТ| Completed | Task type color | None | Strikethrough overlay | default |
   593тЖТ| Disabled | 30% opacity | None | None | not-allowed |
   594тЖТ
   595тЖТ#### 3.1.2 Conflict Glow Animation
   596тЖТ
   597тЖТ```css
   598тЖТ@keyframes conflict-pulse {
   599тЖТ  0%, 100% {
   600тЖТ    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(201, 25, 11, 0.4);
   601тЖТ  }
   602тЖТ  50% {
   603тЖТ    box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(201, 25, 11, 0.7);
   604тЖТ  }
   605тЖТ}
   606тЖТ```
   607тЖТ
   608тЖТ- Duration: 2s
   609тЖТ- Timing: ease-in-out
   610тЖТ- Iteration: infinite
   611тЖТ
   612тЖТ#### 3.1.3 Completed Task Overlay
   613тЖТ
   614тЖТ```css
   615тЖТ.task-completed::after {
   616тЖТ  content: '';
   617тЖТ  position: absolute;
   618тЖТ  top: 50%;
   619тЖТ  left: 0;
   620тЖТ  right: 0;
   621тЖТ  height: 2px;
   622тЖТ  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
   623тЖТ  transform: translateY(-50%);
   624тЖТ}
   625тЖТ```
   626тЖТ
   627тЖТ### 3.2 Zoom Behavior
   628тЖТ
   629тЖТ#### 3.2.1 Mouse Wheel Zoom
   630тЖТ
   631тЖТ| Property | Value |
   632тЖТ|----------|-------|
   633тЖТ| Direction | Wheel up = zoom in, wheel down = zoom out |
   634тЖТ| Anchor | Zoom toward cursor position |
   635тЖТ| Sensitivity | 0.002 per wheel delta |
   636тЖТ| Min Zoom | 0.05x |
   637тЖТ| Max Zoom | 5.0x |
   638тЖТ| Easing | None (immediate) |
   639тЖТ
   640тЖТ**Algorithm:**
   641тЖТ```typescript
   642тЖТ// Zoom toward cursor
   643тЖТconst zoomFactor = Math.exp(-event.deltaY * sensitivity);
   644тЖТconst newZoom = clamp(currentZoom * zoomFactor, minZoom, maxZoom);
   645тЖТ
   646тЖТ// Adjust camera to keep cursor point fixed
   647тЖТconst cursorWorld = screenToWorld(cursor, camera);
   648тЖТcamera.x = cursor.x - cursorWorld.x * newZoom;
   649тЖТcamera.y = cursor.y - cursorWorld.y * newZoom;
   650тЖТcamera.zoom = newZoom;
   651тЖТ```
   652тЖТ
   653тЖТ#### 3.2.2 Pinch-to-Zoom (Touch)
   654тЖТ
   655тЖТ| Property | Value |
   656тЖТ|----------|-------|
   657тЖТ| Anchor | Center point between two fingers |
   658тЖТ| Sensitivity | Direct 1:1 mapping |
   659тЖТ| Threshold | 10px movement before initiating |
   660тЖТ
   661тЖТ#### 3.2.3 Double-Click Zoom
   662тЖТ
   663тЖТ| Action | Behavior |
   664тЖТ|--------|----------|
   665тЖТ| Double-click | Zoom in 2x toward click position |
   666тЖТ| Ctrl + Double-click | Zoom out 2x from click position |
   667тЖТ| Animation | 250ms ease-out |
   668тЖТ
   669тЖТ#### 3.2.4 Keyboard Zoom
   670тЖТ
   671тЖТ| Key | Action |
   672тЖТ|-----|--------|
   673тЖТ| `+` or `=` | Zoom in 1.25x |
   674тЖТ| `-` | Zoom out 0.8x |
   675тЖТ| `0` or `Ctrl+0` | Reset to 1.0x |
   676тЖТ| `Home` | Fit all content |
   677тЖТ
   678тЖТ### 3.3 Pan Behavior
   679тЖТ
   680тЖТ#### 3.3.1 Mouse Pan
   681тЖТ
   682тЖТ| Property | Value |
   683тЖТ|----------|-------|
   684тЖТ| Activation | Click and drag on canvas |
   685тЖТ| Cursor | `grab` (idle), `grabbing` (panning) |
   686тЖТ| Bounds | Elastic bounce at edges |
   687тЖТ
   688тЖТ#### 3.3.2 Inertia Scrolling
   689тЖТ
   690тЖТ| Property | Value |
   691тЖТ|----------|-------|
   692тЖТ| Initial Velocity | Last 3 frames average |
   693тЖТ| Friction | 0.95 per frame |
   694тЖТ| Stop Threshold | velocity < 0.1px/frame |
   695тЖТ
   696тЖТ**Algorithm:**
   697тЖТ```typescript
   698тЖТ// On mouse up
   699тЖТconst velocity = calculateAverageVelocity(last3Frames);
   700тЖТ
   701тЖТ// Animation loop
   702тЖТfunction applyMomentum() {
   703тЖТ  if (Math.abs(velocity.x) < 0.1 && Math.abs(velocity.y) < 0.1) {
   704тЖТ    return; // Stop
   705тЖТ  }
   706тЖТ
   707тЖТ  camera.x += velocity.x;
   708тЖТ  camera.y += velocity.y;
   709тЖТ  velocity.x *= friction;
   710тЖТ  velocity.y *= friction;
   711тЖТ
   712тЖТ  requestAnimationFrame(applyMomentum);
   713тЖТ}
   714тЖТ```
   715тЖТ
   716тЖТ#### 3.3.3 Edge Bounce
   717тЖТ
   718тЖТWhen panning beyond content bounds:
   719тЖТ- Elastic resistance increases with distance
   720тЖТ- Spring-back animation on release
   721тЖТ- Duration: 200ms
   722тЖТ- Easing: `easeOutBack`
   723тЖТ
   724тЖТ#### 3.3.4 Keyboard Pan
   725тЖТ
   726тЖТ| Key | Action |
   727тЖТ|-----|--------|
   728тЖТ| Arrow keys | Pan 100px in direction |
   729тЖТ| Shift + Arrow | Pan 500px in direction |
   730тЖТ| Page Up/Down | Pan one viewport height |
   731тЖТ
   732тЖТ### 3.4 Selection Behavior
   733тЖТ
   734тЖТ#### 3.4.1 Single Selection
   735тЖТ
   736тЖТ| Action | Behavior |
   737тЖТ|--------|----------|
   738тЖТ| Click task | Select task, deselect previous |
   739тЖТ| Click empty | Deselect all |
   740тЖТ| Click selected | Keep selected (for dragging) |
   741тЖТ
   742тЖТ#### 3.4.2 Multi-Selection
   743тЖТ
   744тЖТ| Action | Behavior |
   745тЖТ|--------|----------|
   746тЖТ| Ctrl + Click | Toggle task in selection |
   747тЖТ| Shift + Click | Select range (first to clicked) |
   748тЖТ| Ctrl + A | Select all visible tasks |
   749тЖТ| Escape | Deselect all |
   750тЖТ
   751тЖТ#### 3.4.3 Selection Rectangle (Marquee)
   752тЖТ
   753тЖТ| Property | Value |
   754тЖТ|----------|-------|
   755тЖТ| Activation | Click + drag on empty canvas |
   756тЖТ| Visual | Dashed blue rectangle |
   757тЖТ| Color | `rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.3)` fill, `#0066CC` border |
   758тЖТ
   759тЖТ### 3.5 Drag-and-Drop
   760тЖТ
   761тЖТ#### 3.5.1 Drag Initiation
   762тЖТ
   763тЖТ| Property | Value |
   764тЖТ|----------|-------|
   765тЖТ| Threshold | 5px movement |
   766тЖТ| Delay | 100ms hold |
   767тЖТ| Visual | Task becomes semi-transparent (50%) |
   768тЖТ
   769тЖТ#### 3.5.2 Drop Zones
   770тЖТ
   771тЖТ| Zone Type | Visual Feedback |
   772тЖТ|-----------|-----------------|
   773тЖТ| Valid | Green highlight on row |
   774тЖТ| Invalid | Red highlight, cursor: not-allowed |
   775тЖТ| Snap Point | Blue guide line |
   776тЖТ
   777тЖТ#### 3.5.3 Invalid Drop (Spring-Back)
   778тЖТ
   779тЖТWhen dropped on invalid position:
   780тЖТ1. Task glows red briefly (200ms)
   781тЖТ2. Animates back to original position
   782тЖТ3. Duration: 300ms
   783тЖТ4. Easing: `easeOutElastic`
   784тЖТ

   911тЖТ
   912тЖТ## 6. Responsive Behavior
   913тЖТ
   914тЖТ### 6.1 Breakpoint Definitions
   915тЖТ
   916тЖТ| Name | Min Width | Max Width |
   917тЖТ|------|-----------|-----------|
   918тЖТ| Mobile | 0 | 767px |
   919тЖТ| Tablet | 768px | 1279px |
   920тЖТ| Desktop | 1280px | 1919px |
   921тЖТ| Desktop XL | 1920px | - |
   922тЖТ
   923тЖТ### 6.2 Desktop (>= 1280px)
   924тЖТ
   925тЖТ**Full Layout:**
   926тЖТ- Sidebar: Collapsed (130px) by default, expandable to 280px
   927тЖТ- Minimap: 180px x 120px, bottom-right
   928тЖТ- Task Detail Panel: 400px right drawer
   929тЖТ- Timeline Header: Full feature set
   930тЖТ
   931тЖТ### 6.3 Tablet (768px - 1279px)
   932тЖТ
   933тЖТ**Adaptations:**
   934тЖТ
   935тЖТ| Component | Change |
   936тЖТ|-----------|--------|
   937тЖТ| Sidebar | Always collapsed (100px), no expand |
   938тЖТ| Minimap | Smaller: 140px x 90px |
   939тЖТ| Task Detail Panel | Reduced to 320px width |
   940тЖТ| Navbar KPIs | Collapsed to icons with tooltip |
   941тЖТ| Touch targets | Minimum 44px x 44px |
   942тЖТ
   943тЖТ```
   944тЖТ+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   945тЖТ| [Logo] | [Zoom] | [Mode] | [KPI icons...] | [Settings]           |

   948тЖТ| SIDE   +--------------------------------------------------------+
   949тЖТ| (100)  |                                                        |
   950тЖТ|        |                    MAIN CANVAS                         |
   951тЖТ|        |                                                 +------+|
   952тЖТ|        |                                                 |MINI  ||
   953тЖТ+--------+-------------------------------------------------+------++
   954тЖТ```
   955тЖТ
   956тЖТ### 6.4 Mobile (< 768px)
   957тЖТ
   958тЖТ**Major Adaptations:**
   959тЖТ
   960тЖТ| Component | Change |
   961тЖТ|-----------|--------|
   962тЖТ| Sidebar | Hidden, accessible via hamburger menu |
   963тЖТ| Navbar | Simplified: logo, zoom, hamburger |
   964тЖТ| Minimap | Hidden (toggle button in navbar) |
   965тЖТ| Timeline Header | Simplified to current zoom level only |
   966тЖТ| Task Detail Panel | Full-screen bottom sheet |
   967тЖТ| Canvas | Full-screen with gesture controls |

   985тЖТ**Bottom Sheet (Task Details):**
   986тЖТ- Full width

   988тЖТ- Drag handle at top
   989тЖТ- Swipe down to dismiss
   990тЖТ
   991тЖТ### 6.5 Touch Interactions
   992тЖТ
   993тЖТ| Gesture | Action |
   994тЖТ|---------|--------|
   995тЖТ| One finger drag | Pan canvas |
   996тЖТ| Two finger pinch | Zoom in/out |
   997тЖТ| Tap task | Select task |
   998тЖТ| Long press task | Open context menu |
   999тЖТ| Two finger tap | Deselect all |
  1000тЖТ| Edge swipe (left) | Open sidebar |
  1001тЖТ| Edge swipe (right) | Open task panel (if task selected) |

  1209тЖТ|  |::::+------+::::::::::::::::|  |
  1210тЖТ|  |::::::::::::::::::::::::::::| |
  1211тЖТ|  |::::::::::::::::::::::::::::| |
  1212тЖТ|  +----------------------------+  |
  1213тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1214тЖТ
  1215тЖТLegend:
  1216тЖТ  :::: = Heatmap density (color varies)
  1217тЖТ  +--+ = Current viewport (draggable)
  1218тЖТ  [X] = Close button
  1219тЖТ```
  1220тЖТ
  1221тЖТ### A.8 Mobile Layout
  1222тЖТ
  1223тЖТ```
  1224тЖТCOLLAPSED STATE:
  1225тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1226тЖТ| [=]  MMS           [100%]  [...] |
  1227тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1228тЖТ| January 2024                     |
  1229тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1230тЖТ|                                  |
  1231тЖТ|                                  |
  1232тЖТ|                                  |
  1233тЖТ|        FULL-SCREEN CANVAS        |
  1234тЖТ|                                  |
  1235тЖТ|                                  |
  1236тЖТ|                                  |
  1237тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1238тЖТ| [Map] [Filter] [+] [-] [Select]  |
  1239тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1240тЖТ
  1241тЖТTASK SELECTED (Bottom Sheet):
  1242тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1243тЖТ| [=]  MMS           [100%]  [...] |
  1244тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1245тЖТ| January 2024                     |
  1246тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1247тЖТ|                                  |
  1248тЖТ|        CANVAS (50% height)       |
  1249тЖТ|                                  |
  1250тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1251тЖТ|  ====  (drag handle)             |
  1252тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1253тЖТ|  [PM] Preventive Maintenance     |
  1254тЖТ|  ALT-042 | Mar 15-22             |
  1255тЖТ|                                  |
  1256тЖТ|  [Reschedule] [Complete]         |
  1257тЖТ+----------------------------------+
  1258тЖТ```
  1259тЖТ
  1260тЖТ---
  1261тЖТ
  1262тЖТ## Sources
  1263тЖТ
  1264тЖТResearch conducted from the following sources:
  1265тЖТ
  1266тЖТ- [IBM Maximo Asset Management Scheduler](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/mams/7.6.5?topic=maximo-asset-management-scheduler-plus)
  1267тЖТ- [Railnova Railway Fleet Management](https://www.railnova.eu/)
  1268тЖТ- [Railfleet ECM Fleet and Maintenance Management](https://www.railnova.eu/products/railfleet/)
  1269тЖТ- [Signature Rail Planning Solutions](https://signaturerail.com/planning-solutions/)
  1270тЖТ- [PatternFly 6 Dark Theme Handbook](https://www.patternfly.org/developer-resources/dark-theme-handbook/)
  1271тЖТ- [PatternFly 6 Token Documentation](https://www.patternfly.org/tokens/develop-with-tokens/)
  1272тЖТ- [PatternFly 6 Colors](https://www.patternfly.org/design-foundations/colors/)
  1273тЖТ- [PatternFly 6 Typography](https://www.patternfly.org/design-foundations/typography/)
  1274тЖТ- [Infinite Canvas Tutorial](https://github.com/xiaoiver/infinite-canvas-tutorial)
  1275тЖТ- [Creating a Zoom UI - Steve Ruiz](https://www.steveruiz.me/posts/zoom-ui)
  1276тЖТ
  1277тЖТ---
  1278тЖТ
  1279тЖТ*This document is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for MMS UX implementation. All development must adhere to these specifications. Deviations require explicit approval and documentation.*
  1280тЖТ

# MMS (Metro Maintenance Scheduler) - UX Specification

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Last Updated:** 2026-01-07
> **Status:** SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for implementation
> **Target:** Dubai Metro - 128 trains x 12 years x ~60k tasks @ 60fps

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Application Shell Layout](#1-application-shell-layout)
2. [Component Specifications](#2-component-specifications)
3. [Interaction States](#3-interaction-states)
4. [Color Palette](#4-color-palette)
5. [Typography](#5-typography)
6. [Responsive Behavior](#6-responsive-behavior)
7. [Appendix: ASCII Wireframes](#appendix-ascii-wireframes)

---

## 1. Application Shell Layout

### 1.1 Overall Architecture

The application uses a **Three-Layer Sandwich** architecture:

```
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                        LAYER 3: HUD OVERLAY                            |
|   HTML/React - pointer-events: none (except interactive elements)      |
|   - Navbar, Sidebar, Timeline Header, Minimap, Tooltips, Panels        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                        LAYER 2: CANVAS (WebGL)                         |
|   PixiJS/R3F - Main rendering surface                                  |
|   - Task bars, dependency lines, heatmaps, LOD layers                  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                        LAYER 1: ENGINE                                 |
|   Background workers - constraint processing, data calculations        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 1.2 Viewport Dimensions

| Breakpoint | Width | Layout |
|------------|-------|--------|
| Desktop XL | >= 1920px | Full layout, expanded sidebar |
| Desktop | >= 1280px | Full layout, collapsed sidebar by default |
| Tablet | 768px - 1279px | Collapsed sidebar, smaller minimap |
| Mobile | < 768px | Full-screen canvas, bottom sheet panels |

### 1.3 Region Dimensions (Desktop >= 1280px)

```
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                NAVBAR (56px height)                                |
+-------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------+
|             |                   TIMELINE HEADER (32px height)                      |
|   SIDEBAR   +---------------------------------------------------------------------+
|  (130px     |                                                                     |
|  collapsed) |                                                                     |
|             |                      MAIN CANVAS                                    |
|  (280px     |                  (flex: fills remaining space)                      |
|  expanded)  |                                                                     |
|             |                                                     +---------------+
|             |                                                     |   MINIMAP     |
|             |                                                     |  (180x120px)  |
+-------------+-----------------------------------------------------+---------------+
```

### 1.4 Z-Index Layering

| Layer | Z-Index | Contents |
|-------|---------|----------|
| Modals/Dialogs | 1000 | Confirmation dialogs, alerts |
| Dropdowns | 900 | Navbar dropdowns, context menus |
| Tooltips | 800 | Task tooltips, info hovers |
| Detail Panel | 700 | Right drawer (400px) |
| Minimap | 600 | Bottom-right navigation |
| Navbar | 500 | Top navigation bar |
| Sidebar | 400 | Left train list |
| Timeline Header | 300 | Top timeline ruler |
| Canvas | 0 | Main WebGL surface |

### 1.5 Dark Theme Colors (Application Shell)

| Region | Token | Value (Dark) | Usage |
|--------|-------|--------------|-------|
| App Background | `--pf-t--global--background--color--primary--default` | `#151515` | Main app background |
| Canvas Background | `--mms-bg-canvas` | `#0A0A0A` | WebGL canvas |
| Panel Background | `--mms-bg-panel` | `#1F1F1F` | Sidebar, navbar |
| Surface Background | `--mms-bg-surface` | `#292929` | Cards, elevated elements |
| Border Default | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` | `#3D3D3D` | Dividers |

---

## 2. Component Specifications

### 2.1 Navbar

**Dimensions:** Full width x 56px height
**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (bottom)

```
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| [Logo]  |  [<] [100%] [>] [Fit] |  [Baseline|Scenario] |  Tasks: 12.4k | [...]  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
   ^              ^                         ^                   ^            ^
   |              |                         |                   |            |
 24x24px     Zoom Controls           Mode Toggle           KPI Badge    Settings
```

#### 2.1.1 Logo (Left Region)

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Position | Left, 16px padding |
| Size | 24px x 24px icon + text |
| Font | RedHatDisplay, 16px, semibold (700) |
| Color | `--pf-t--global--text--color--regular` |
| Text | "MMS" or "Metro Scheduler" |

#### 2.1.2 Zoom Controls (Center-Left Region)

| Element | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Container | Horizontal flex, gap: 8px |
| Zoom Out Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `minus`, border-radius: 4px |
| Zoom Indicator | Min-width: 60px, text-align: center, format: "125%" |
| Zoom In Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `plus`, border-radius: 4px |
| Fit-to-View Button | 32px x 32px, icon: `expand`, tooltip: "Fit all tasks" |
| Buttons Background | `--mms-bg-surface` hover: `--mms-bg-hover` |

#### 2.1.3 Mode Toggle (Center Region)

| State | Visual | Color |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Baseline (Active) | Solid button | `#0066CC` (PatternFly blue) |
| Baseline (Inactive) | Outline button | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` |
| Scenario (Active) | Solid button | `#6753AC` (PatternFly purple) |
| Scenario (Inactive) | Outline button | `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` |

**Behavior:**
- Toggle switches between Baseline (production data) and Scenario (sandbox)
- Active mode shows solid background with icon
- Scenario mode adds subtle purple tint to canvas border

#### 2.1.4 KPI Indicators (Center-Right Region)

```
+---------------------------------------------------+
| Tasks: 12,456 | Conflicts: 23 | Utilization: 87% |
+---------------------------------------------------+
```

| KPI | Format | Color Logic |
|-----|--------|-------------|
| Total Tasks | Number with commas | Static white |
| Conflicts | Number | Red if > 0, green if 0 |
| Resource Utilization | Percentage | Green 80-100%, Yellow 60-79%, Red <60% |

**Badge Styling:**
- Background: `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)`
- Border-radius: 16px (pill shape)
- Padding: 4px 12px
- Font: 12px, medium (500)

#### 2.1.5 Settings Dropdown (Right Region)

| Item | Icon | Action |
|------|------|--------|
| Theme | `moon`/`sun` | Toggle dark/light theme |
| Export | `download` | Export schedule as CSV/PDF |
| Settings | `cog` | Open settings modal |
| Help | `question-circle` | Open help documentation |

---

### 2.2 Train Sidebar (Left Panel)

**Dimensions:**
- Collapsed: 130px width
- Expanded: 280px width
- Height: Full viewport minus navbar (calc(100vh - 56px))

**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (right)

#### 2.2.1 Collapsed State (130px)

```
+------------------+
| [>] Trains (128) |
+------------------+
| [T] ALT-001      |
| [T] ALT-002      |
| [T] ALT-003      |
| ...              |
| [T] KNK-050      |
+------------------+
```

| Element | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Header Height | 44px |
| Expand Button | 24px x 24px, icon: `chevron-right` |
| Header Text | "Trains (128)", 14px, semibold |
| Row Height | Synced with canvas: `pxPerTrain * zoom` (default: 24px) |
| Train Icon | 16px x 16px, color varies by asset type |
| Train ID | 12px, monospace (RedHatMono) |
| Hover State | Background: `--mms-bg-hover` |
| Selected State | Background: `--mms-bg-selected`, left border: 3px `--pf-t--global--color--brand--default` |

**Train Icon Colors:**
- ALSTOM: `#3B82F6` (blue)
- KINKI: `#F59E0B` (amber)

#### 2.2.2 Expanded State (280px)

```
+--------------------------------+
| [<] Trains (128)   [Search...] |
+--------------------------------+
| [T] ALT-001                    |
|     Alstom Metropolis          |
|     Status: In Service         |
+--------------------------------+
| [T] ALT-002                    |
|     Alstom Metropolis          |
|     Status: Maintenance        |
+--------------------------------+
```

| Element | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Search Input | Full width minus padding, height: 32px |
| Row Height | 72px (3 lines of info) |
| Primary Text | Train ID, 14px, semibold |
| Secondary Text | Fleet name, 12px, `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` |
| Status Badge | 10px, pill shape, color by status |

**Status Badge Colors:**
- In Service: `#3E8635` (green)
- Maintenance: `#F0AB00` (gold)
- Out of Service: `#C9190B` (red)

#### 2.2.3 Scroll Synchronization

The sidebar scroll position MUST be synchronized with the canvas Y position:

```typescript
// Sidebar scroll offset calculation
const sidebarScrollTop = camera.y * zoom;
```

---

### 2.3 Timeline Header

**Dimensions:** Full canvas width x 32px height
**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (bottom)

#### 2.3.1 Display by Zoom Level

| Zoom Range | Primary Labels | Secondary Labels | Grid Lines |
|------------|----------------|------------------|------------|
| < 0.3x | Years (2024, 2025...) | None | Year boundaries |
| 0.3x - 0.7x | Years | Quarters (Q1, Q2...) | Quarter boundaries |
| 0.7x - 1.5x | Quarters | Months (Jan, Feb...) | Month boundaries |
| 1.5x - 3.0x | Months | Weeks (W1, W2...) | Week boundaries |
| > 3.0x | Weeks | Days (Mon, Tue...) | Day boundaries |

#### 2.3.2 Label Styling

| Label Type | Font | Color | Position |
|------------|------|-------|----------|
| Primary | 14px, semibold | `--pf-t--global--text--color--regular` | Baseline, left-aligned to boundary |
| Secondary | 11px, regular | `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` | Below primary, center-aligned |
| Today Marker | 11px, bold | `#0066CC` | Vertical line + "Today" label |

#### 2.3.3 Today Indicator

```
                    |
                 [Today]
                    |
                    v
```

- Vertical line: 2px width, `#0066CC`
- Label: "Today" in blue pill badge
- Extends full canvas height as dotted line

---

### 2.4 Semantic Zoom Canvas (Main Area)

**Position:** Fills remaining space after navbar, sidebar, and timeline header
**Background:** `--mms-bg-canvas` (#0A0A0A)

#### 2.4.1 LOD (Level of Detail) System

```
Zoom:  0.05  0.35  0.50         2.00  2.15  5.0
        |     |     |             |     |    |
MACRO   [=====|-----|             |     |    ]  100% opacity -> fade out
MESO          [-----|=============|-----|    ]  fade in -> 100% -> fade out
MICRO               |             [-----|====]  fade in -> 100% opacity
        |     |     |             |     |    |
        |     +-----+             +-----+    |
        |   crossfade            crossfade   |
        |     zone                 zone      |
```

| LOD Level | Zoom Range | Visualization | Opacity Calculation |
|-----------|------------|---------------|---------------------|
| MACRO | < 0.35 | Heatmap grid | 100% |
| MACRO->MESO | 0.35-0.50 | Crossfade | Linear interpolation |
| MESO | 0.50-2.00 | Task blocks (DNA) | 100% |
| MESO->MICRO | 2.00-2.15 | Crossfade | Linear interpolation |
| MICRO | > 2.15 | Full task cards | 100% |

#### 2.4.2 MACRO View (Heatmap)

**Zoom Range:** < 0.5x
**Cell Size:** 300px width x 24px height (30 days x 1 train)

```
+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+
| 2024  |       |       |       |       | 2025  |
+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+
|  [3]  |  [7]  |  [2]  |  [5]  |  [8]  |  [4]  | ALT-001
+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+
|  [5]  |  [2]  |  [9]  |  [3]  |  [1]  |  [6]  | ALT-002
+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+
|  [1]  |  [4]  |  [6]  |  [8]  |  [2]  |  [3]  | ALT-003
+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+-------+
```

**Heatmap Color Scale (YlOrRd interpolator):**

| Density | Color | Hex |
|---------|-------|-----|
| Empty (0) | Light cream | `#FFFFD4` |
| Low (1-3) | Light yellow | `#FED98E` |
| Medium (4-6) | Orange | `#FE9929` |
| High (7-9) | Dark orange | `#D95F0E` |
| Very High (10+) | Red | `#993404` |

**Cell Behavior:**
- NOT pickable (no hover/click interaction)
- Shows task count as centered number (optional, zoom > 0.3x)

#### 2.4.3 MESO View (DNA Strips / Task Blocks)

**Zoom Range:** 0.5x - 2.0x

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                           Q1 2024                                 |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ALT-001 | [====MAINT====]        [==OVH==]      [INSP]           |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ALT-002 |      [=====MAINT=====]            [==OVH==]            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ALT-003 | [INSP]   [=====MAINT=====]                   [INSP]    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

**Task Block Styling:**

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Height | 18px (within 24px row) |
| Border Radius | 4px |
| Vertical Margin | 3px top/bottom |
| Minimum Width | 4px (tasks < 1 day) |

**Task Block Colors:**

| Task Type | Default | Hover | Selected |
|-----------|---------|-------|----------|
| Maintenance | `#3B82F6` | `#60A5FA` (+brightness) | `#3B82F6` + cyan border |
| Overhaul | `#F59E0B` | `#FBBF24` (+brightness) | `#F59E0B` + cyan border |
| Inspection | `#6B7280` | `#9CA3AF` (+brightness) | `#6B7280` + cyan border |
| Conflict | Red glow overlay | Intensified glow | Red glow + cyan border |

**Row Backgrounds (Alternating):**
- Even rows: `rgba(255,255,255,0.02)`
- Odd rows: `rgba(248,250,252,0.03)`

#### 2.4.4 MICRO View (Detailed Task Cards)

**Zoom Range:** > 2.0x

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                        Week 12, 2024                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ALT-001 |                                                         |
|         | +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|         | | [M] Preventive Maintenance PM2                   |   |
|         | | Mar 15 - Mar 22 (7 days)                         |   |
|         | | [Dependencies: 3] [Resources: 2]                 |   |
|         | +--------------------------------------------------+   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

**Task Card Dimensions:**
- Height: 64px minimum, 80px with expanded details
- Width: Proportional to duration (pxPerDay * duration * zoom)
- Min Width: 120px (shows abbreviated info if smaller)
- Padding: 8px

**Task Card Content:**

| Element | Font | Position |
|---------|------|----------|
| Type Icon | 16px | Top-left |
| Task Title | 14px, semibold | Top, after icon |
| Date Range | 12px, regular | Below title |
| Duration Badge | 11px, pill | Top-right |
| Metadata Row | 11px, subtle | Bottom |

**Dependency Lines:**

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Color | `rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.8)` (violet) |
| Width | 2px |
| Style | Curved bezier path |
| Arrow | 6px triangle at endpoint |
| Hover | 3px width, full opacity |

**Grid Lines:**

| Type | Color | Width |
|------|-------|-------|
| Train Row Boundaries | `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)` | 1px |
| Week Boundaries | `rgba(255,255,255,0.05)` | 1px |
| Month Boundaries | `rgba(255,255,255,0.15)` | 1.5px |
| Year Boundaries | `rgba(255,255,255,0.25)` | 2px |

---

### 2.5 Minimap

**Dimensions:** 180px width x 120px height
**Position:** Bottom-right, 16px margin from edges
**Background:** `--mms-bg-surface` (#292929)
**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default`
**Border Radius:** 8px
**Box Shadow:** `0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)`

```
+----------------------------------+
|  [X]  Minimap                    |
+----------------------------------+
|  +----------------------------+  |
|  | [Heatmap Grid 36x26]       |  |
|  |        +----+              |  |
|  |        |    | <- Viewport  |  |
|  |        +----+              |  |
|  +----------------------------+  |
+----------------------------------+
```

#### 2.5.1 Heatmap Grid

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Grid Cells | 36 columns (months) x ~26 rows (groups of 5 trains) |
| Cell Size | ~5px x ~4px |
| Color Scale | Same as MACRO view (YlOrRd) |

#### 2.5.2 Viewport Rectangle

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Border | 2px solid `#0066CC` |
| Fill | `rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.2)` |
| Corner Radius | 2px |

#### 2.5.3 Interactions

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Click | Jump viewport center to clicked position |
| Drag rectangle | Pan main canvas |
| Scroll (inside minimap) | Zoom main canvas |
| Close button | Toggle minimap visibility |

---

### 2.6 Task Detail Panel (Right Drawer)

**Dimensions:** 400px width x full height
**Position:** Right side, slides in from right
**Background:** `--mms-bg-panel` (#1F1F1F)
**Border:** 1px solid `--pf-t--global--border--color--default` (left)
**Animation:** 200ms ease-out slide

```
+----------------------------------------+
| [<] Task Details                   [X] |
+----------------------------------------+
|                                        |
| +------------------------------------+ |
| | [M] Preventive Maintenance PM2     | |
| |                                    | |
| | Type: Maintenance                  | |
| | Status: Scheduled                  | |
| +------------------------------------+ |
|                                        |
| Train Information                      |
| +------------------------------------+ |
| | [T] ALT-042                        | |
| | Alstom Metropolis                  | |
| | Current Mileage: 245,678 km        | |
| +------------------------------------+ |
|                                        |
| Schedule                               |
| +------------------------------------+ |
| | Start: March 15, 2024              | |
| | End: March 22, 2024                | |
| | Duration: 7 days                   | |
| | Track: T3 (Depot A)                | |
| +------------------------------------+ |
|                                        |
| Dependencies (3)                       |
| +------------------------------------+ |
| | -> Inspection INS-2341 (completed) | |
| | -> Parts Order PO-9921 (pending)   | |
| | <- Certification CRT-441 (blocks)  | |
| +------------------------------------+ |
|                                        |
| Conflicts (1)                          |
| +------------------------------------+ |
| | [!] Track T3 unavailable Mar 18    | |
| |     Overlaps with ALT-051 OVH      | |
| +------------------------------------+ |
|                                        |
+----------------------------------------+
| [Reschedule]  [Complete]  [Delete]     |
+----------------------------------------+
```

#### 2.6.1 Header

| Element | Specification |
|---------|---------------|
| Back Button | 24px icon, returns to previous selection |
| Title | "Task Details", 16px, semibold |
| Close Button | 24px icon, closes panel |
| Height | 56px |

#### 2.6.2 Content Sections

| Section | Contents |
|---------|----------|
| Task Overview | Type icon, title, type badge, status badge |
| Train Information | Train icon, ID, fleet name, mileage |
| Schedule | Start/end dates, duration, assigned track |
| Dependencies | List with direction arrows and status |
| Conflicts | Warning cards with conflict details |

#### 2.6.3 Action Buttons (Footer)

| Button | Style | Color | Action |
|--------|-------|-------|--------|
| Reschedule | Primary | Blue | Opens reschedule modal |
| Mark Complete | Secondary | Green | Marks task as done |
| Delete | Danger | Red | Confirmation then delete |

---

## 3. Interaction States

### 3.1 Task States

#### 3.1.1 Visual State Matrix

| State | Background | Border | Effects | Cursor |
|-------|------------|--------|---------|--------|
| Default | Task type color | None | None | default |
| Hover | +20% brightness | None | Slight scale (1.02) | pointer |
| Selected | Task type color | 2px cyan `#06B6D4` | Elevation shadow | pointer |
| Dragging | 50% opacity | 2px dashed | Drop shadow | grabbing |
| Conflict | Task type color | None | Red glow (pulsing) | pointer |
| Completed | Task type color | None | Strikethrough overlay | default |
| Disabled | 30% opacity | None | None | not-allowed |

#### 3.1.2 Conflict Glow Animation

```css
@keyframes conflict-pulse {
  0%, 100% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(201, 25, 11, 0.4);
  }
  50% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(201, 25, 11, 0.7);
  }
}
```

- Duration: 2s
- Timing: ease-in-out
- Iteration: infinite

#### 3.1.3 Completed Task Overlay

```css
.task-completed::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}
```

### 3.2 Zoom Behavior

#### 3.2.1 Mouse Wheel Zoom

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Direction | Wheel up = zoom in, wheel down = zoom out |
| Anchor | Zoom toward cursor position |
| Sensitivity | 0.002 per wheel delta |
| Min Zoom | 0.05x |
| Max Zoom | 5.0x |
| Easing | None (immediate) |

**Algorithm:**
```typescript
// Zoom toward cursor
const zoomFactor = Math.exp(-event.deltaY * sensitivity);
const newZoom = clamp(currentZoom * zoomFactor, minZoom, maxZoom);

// Adjust camera to keep cursor point fixed
const cursorWorld = screenToWorld(cursor, camera);
camera.x = cursor.x - cursorWorld.x * newZoom;
camera.y = cursor.y - cursorWorld.y * newZoom;
camera.zoom = newZoom;
```

#### 3.2.2 Pinch-to-Zoom (Touch)

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Anchor | Center point between two fingers |
| Sensitivity | Direct 1:1 mapping |
| Threshold | 10px movement before initiating |

#### 3.2.3 Double-Click Zoom

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Double-click | Zoom in 2x toward click position |
| Ctrl + Double-click | Zoom out 2x from click position |
| Animation | 250ms ease-out |

#### 3.2.4 Keyboard Zoom

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `+` or `=` | Zoom in 1.25x |
| `-` | Zoom out 0.8x |
| `0` or `Ctrl+0` | Reset to 1.0x |
| `Home` | Fit all content |

### 3.3 Pan Behavior

#### 3.3.1 Mouse Pan

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Activation | Click and drag on canvas |
| Cursor | `grab` (idle), `grabbing` (panning) |
| Bounds | Elastic bounce at edges |

#### 3.3.2 Inertia Scrolling

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Initial Velocity | Last 3 frames average |
| Friction | 0.95 per frame |
| Stop Threshold | velocity < 0.1px/frame |

**Algorithm:**
```typescript
// On mouse up
const velocity = calculateAverageVelocity(last3Frames);

// Animation loop
function applyMomentum() {
  if (Math.abs(velocity.x) < 0.1 && Math.abs(velocity.y) < 0.1) {
    return; // Stop
  }

  camera.x += velocity.x;
  camera.y += velocity.y;
  velocity.x *= friction;
  velocity.y *= friction;

  requestAnimationFrame(applyMomentum);
}
```

#### 3.3.3 Edge Bounce

When panning beyond content bounds:
- Elastic resistance increases with distance
- Spring-back animation on release
- Duration: 200ms
- Easing: `easeOutBack`

#### 3.3.4 Keyboard Pan

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Arrow keys | Pan 100px in direction |
| Shift + Arrow | Pan 500px in direction |
| Page Up/Down | Pan one viewport height |

### 3.4 Selection Behavior

#### 3.4.1 Single Selection

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Click task | Select task, deselect previous |
| Click empty | Deselect all |
| Click selected | Keep selected (for dragging) |

#### 3.4.2 Multi-Selection

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Ctrl + Click | Toggle task in selection |
| Shift + Click | Select range (first to clicked) |
| Ctrl + A | Select all visible tasks |
| Escape | Deselect all |

#### 3.4.3 Selection Rectangle (Marquee)

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Activation | Click + drag on empty canvas |
| Visual | Dashed blue rectangle |
| Color | `rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.3)` fill, `#0066CC` border |

### 3.5 Drag-and-Drop

#### 3.5.1 Drag Initiation

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Threshold | 5px movement |
| Delay | 100ms hold |
| Visual | Task becomes semi-transparent (50%) |

#### 3.5.2 Drop Zones

| Zone Type | Visual Feedback |
|-----------|-----------------|
| Valid | Green highlight on row |
| Invalid | Red highlight, cursor: not-allowed |
| Snap Point | Blue guide line |

#### 3.5.3 Invalid Drop (Spring-Back)

When dropped on invalid position:
1. Task glows red briefly (200ms)
2. Animates back to original position
3. Duration: 300ms
4. Easing: `easeOutElastic`

## 6. Responsive Behavior

| Mobile | 0 | 767px |
| Tablet | 768px | 1279px |
| Desktop | 1280px | 1919px |
| Desktop XL | 1920px | - |

### 6.2 Desktop (>= 1280px)

**Full Layout:**
- Sidebar: Collapsed (130px) by default, expandable to 280px
- Minimap: 180px x 120px, bottom-right
- Task Detail Panel: 400px right drawer
- Timeline Header: Full feature set

### 6.3 Tablet (768px - 1279px)

**Adaptations:**

| Component | Change |
|-----------|--------|
| Sidebar | Always collapsed (100px), no expand |
| Minimap | Smaller: 140px x 90px |
| Task Detail Panel | Reduced to 320px width |
| Navbar KPIs | Collapsed to icons with tooltip |
| Touch targets | Minimum 44px x 44px |

+--------+-------------------------------------------------+------++

### 6.4 Mobile (< 768px)

| Sidebar | Hidden, accessible via hamburger menu |
| Navbar | Simplified: logo, zoom, hamburger |
| Minimap | Hidden (toggle button in navbar) |
| Timeline Header | Simplified to current zoom level only |
| Task Detail Panel | Full-screen bottom sheet |
| Canvas | Full-screen with gesture controls |

+----------------------------------+
```

**Bottom Sheet (Task Details):**
- Full width
- Height: 50% of viewport (expandable to 90%)
- Drag handle at top
- Swipe down to dismiss

### 6.5 Touch Interactions

| Two finger pinch | Zoom in/out |
| Tap task | Select task |
